rows_dropped_reason: failure is non-null (e.g. 'emb:nodata_or_oob'); trainer keeps rows where failure.isna()

gedi.note: prefix gedi_ picked up by trainer feature_cols filter

topography.note: SRTM v3 (USGS/SRTMGL1_003) derivatives via ee.Terrain.slope/aspect + focal_mean TPI

disturbance.note: Hansen GFC 2025 lossyear; sentinel 100 = undisturbed; 0 = disturbed 2023 or later

gedi_columns.name: gedi_rh98
gedi_columns.meaning: 98th percentile relative height (m); proxy for canopy top height
gedi_columns.composite: median over 2021-01-01 to 2024-01-01, quality_flag==1 and degrade_flag==0
gedi_columns.reducer: mean over 500 m buffer at 25 m scale

gedi_columns.name: gedi_cover
gedi_columns.composite: median over 2021-01-01 to 2024-01-01, l2b_quality_flag==1 and degrade_flag==0
gedi_columns.reducer: mean over 500 m buffer at 25 m scale

gedi_columns.name: gedi_pai
gedi_columns.composite: median over 2021-01-01 to 2024-01-01, l2b_quality_flag==1 and degrade_flag==0
gedi_columns.reducer: mean over 500 m buffer at 25 m scale

gedi_columns.name: gedi_fhd_normal
gedi_columns.meaning: foliage height diversity (normalised Shannon entropy of plant area density profile)
gedi_columns.composite: median over 2021-01-01 to 2024-01-01, l2b_quality_flag==1 and degrade_flag==0
gedi_columns.reducer: mean over 500 m buffer at 25 m scale

gedi_columns.name: gedi_n_samples
gedi_columns.meaning: number of monthly GEDI L2A composites (out of 36) with >= 1 valid pixel within the 500 m buffer; integer 0-36
gedi_columns.composite: binary presence image per month (1 where rh98 valid after quality mask, 0 elsewhere); summed across 36 months; max over 500 m buffer
gedi_columns.reducer: max over 500 m buffer at 25 m scale

iteration_2_columns.name: chm_m
iteration_2_columns.meaning: Mean canopy height in metres at plot centroid
iteration_2_columns.reducer: mean (point sample at centroid, scale=10 m)

iteration_2_columns.name: topo_elevation
iteration_2_columns.meaning: Surface elevation in metres (SRTM v3, USGS/SRTMGL1_003)
iteration_2_columns.reducer: mean (point sample at centroid, scale=30 m)

iteration_2_columns.name: topo_slope
iteration_2_columns.reducer: mean (point sample at centroid, scale=30 m)

iteration_2_columns.name: topo_aspect_cos
iteration_2_columns.meaning: Cosine of terrain aspect angle (aspect in radians); encodes N/S component
iteration_2_columns.reducer: mean (point sample at centroid, scale=30 m)

iteration_2_columns.name: topo_aspect_sin
iteration_2_columns.meaning: Sine of terrain aspect angle (aspect in radians); encodes E/W component
iteration_2_columns.reducer: mean (point sample at centroid, scale=30 m)

iteration_2_columns.name: topo_tpi
iteration_2_columns.meaning: Topographic Position Index: elevation minus focal mean within 500 m radius (positive = ridge, negative = valley)
iteration_2_columns.reducer: mean (point sample at centroid, scale=30 m)

iteration_2_columns.name: dist_years_since
iteration_2_columns.meaning: Years since most recent recorded forest loss (Hansen GFC 2025). dist_years_since = max(0, 23 − lossyear) where lossyear > 0 (lossyear is encoded 1=2001 … 25=2025); 100 where no loss recorded (lossyear == 0). max(0, ...) clamps post-2023 disturbance (lossyear 24–25) to 0.
iteration_2_columns.reducer: mean (point sample at centroid, scale=30 m)

dropped_columns.name: gedi_temporal_coverage_months
dropped_columns.reason: identical to gedi_n_samples for monthly composites; redundant as model feature
